description: Learn how to set up an anti-phishing code on Binance to enhance your account security. This video explains the importance of preventing phishing attacks and provides a step-by-step guide on configuring your anti-phishing code.
topic_summary: This video covers the setup of an anti-phishing code on Binance, explaining what phishing attacks are [t=2:8] and how to protect yourself by verifying emails from Binance [t=87:73].
